# add_concept_intersect_days { #cdmconnector.add_concept_intersect_days }

```python
add_concept_intersect_days(
    table,
    cdm,
    concept_set,
    *,
    index_date='cohort_start_date',
    censor_date=None,
    window=[(0, float('inf'))],
    target_date='event_start_date',
    order='first',
    in_observation=True,
    name_style='{concept_name}_{window_name}',
)
```

Add days to first/last concept record within each window.
